revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月三十]][[zh:八月三十]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 30|qq=August 30}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> == Events == * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}} {{ill|October 10|en|October 10|qid=Q2921|lt=October 10|1=October 10}} ) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} establishes the {{ill|Yōgakusho|ja|洋学所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōgakusho|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 蕃書調所|1=Bansho Shirabesho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q2883486}} (later renamed {{ill|Bansho Shirabesho|en|Bansho Shirabesho|qid=Q2883486|lt=Bansho Shirabesho|1=Bansho Shirabesho}} ) in {{ill|Kudanshita|ja|九段下|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kudanshita|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 九段|1=Kudan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11370414}} . * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|October 2|en|October 2|qid=Q2932|lt=October 2|1=October 2}} ) – The Meiji government allows farmers occupational freedom, the monetization of {{ill|Nengu|ja|年貢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nengu|1=nengu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11483871}} rice, and commercial ventures. * Meiji 5 (Gregorian 1872 October 2) – Japan’s first station {{ill|Concession stand|en|Concession stand|qid=Q10931483|lt=kiosk|1=Concession stand}} opens within {{ill|Shimbashi Station|en|Shimbashi Station|qid=Q801436|lt=Shimbashi Station|1=Shimbashi Station}} . == Births == == Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1146161}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1770|en|1770|qid=Q7683|lt=1770|1=1770}} {{ill|October 18|en|October 18|qid=Q2964|lt=October 18|1=October 18}} ) – {{ill|Kutsuki Tsunetsuna|ja|朽木玄綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kutsuki Tsunetsuna|1=Kutsuki Tōtsuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10729461}} , {{ill|lord|ja|藩主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lord|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藩|1=Han system|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q841985}} of {{ill|Fukuchiyama Domain|en|Fukuchiyama Domain|qid=Q10863513|lt=Fukuchiyama Domain|1=Fukuchiyama Domain}} (* {{ill|1709|en|1709|qid=Q6857|lt=1709|1=1709}} ).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|29|9|1|7|30|9|8|0830|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
